summary: Completed frontend testing of navigation active state bug fix. Verified Home and Products nav links display correct active/inactive states on both pages.
passed_tests: Home page navigation - Home link active (gold), Products link inactive (white/80)
Products page navigation - Products link active (gold), Home link inactive (white/80)
Navigation between Home and Products pages works correctly
Active state styling applies correct classes (text-dune-gold, border-dune-gold)
Inactive state styling applies correct classes (text-white/80)
